title: cirsium tashiroi var. hidaense
intro: Cirsium tashiroi var. hidaense, also known as Hida thistle, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb native to Japan, characterized by its prickly leaves and purple flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In traditional herbal medicine, Hida thistle is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is believed to offer health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function.
